events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes open stud bays at floor transitions in a commercial project, with fireblocking & draftstopping under review. IRC R302 requires fireblocking at floor/ceiling assemblies and wall/floor intersections to prevent vertical fire spread. Open stud bays at floor transitions mean fireblocking is missing, which is non-compliant.

  "findings": [
    "Open stud bays at floor transitions lack required fireblocking, allowing vertical flame and smoke spread between floors.",
    "Fireblocking/draftstopping not installed at concealed spaces at floor-ceiling and wall-floor intersections."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install approved fireblocking (mineral wool, fiberglass batt, or listed fireblocking material) in all stud bays at each floor transition before concealment.",
    "Schedule third-party inspection of fireblocking prior to closing up wall and floor assemblies."
  ],
  "rationale": "IRC R302 requires fireblocking in concealed stud spaces at floor/ceiling and wall/floor intersections to restrict vertical movement of flame and gases. Open stud bays at floor transitions are a direct non-compliance and a life-safety hazard.",
  "references": ["IRC R302"]
}
